title: GreenCloud - Affordable KVM and Windows VPS
desc: Affordable KVM VPS, Windows VPS. Serving thousands of customers around the world with 24/7/365 support and a platform featuring uptime above 99.99%.

Customer's Reviews
Have been using this provider for more than 1 year. It was an easy provisioning. After that the VPS up and running without issue. Performance is as advertised and reliable at least under my monitoring tool. Consider price, performance, and support, I would recommend GreenCloud.
aslisanta
Trustpilot
Since I bought the VPS from GreenCloud, it has basically no issue whatsoever. Everything runs smoothly, and the network performance is really fantastic. The xTom service which the GreenCloud built up on has amazing connectivity worldwide and the price of the services are, I'd say, very reasonable. Overall, I'm quite satisfied with the service so far and will continue to use it as long as they keep their service quality.
flyingsnow
Trustpilot
The VPS is reliable and fast, and GreenCloud supporting staff is very active when supporting tickets. So I have recommended it to my friends.
zonghai lv
